g.text: paper, book, oracle, conv, skill, quest,
todo, memory, gripe, fc, web, youtube, math,
provider : text ' arxiv, crossref, manual, ... (free text)
content_hash : char(64) ' SHA-256 of normalized text
chunk_kind : text ' card, paragraph, figure, equation,
block_ids : bigint[] ' Marker blocks (papers); empty otherwise
Every ref has exactly one chunk at
namespace : text ' SRC, CACHE, STATUS, PRIO, CONFIDENCE, DENSITY, ...
later if a real query surfaces.
